message:
Make sitemap section headings link to index pages

Section headings (H2 and H3) now link to their index pages when
available. The script detects index/overview pages by checking if
the first item is a parent path of other items, removes them from
the item list to avoid duplication, and uses them as the section
heading link instead.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
